'''âw-b-h''' ('''wabaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jewel|jewel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jewel|jewel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| wabaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wabahithi|wabahithi]] || [[word:wabahiji|wabahiji]] || [[word:wabahishi|wabahishi]] || [[word:wabahi|wabahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wabahuthuth|wabahuthuth]] || [[word:wabahujuj|wabahujuj]] || [[word:wabahushush|wabahushush]] || [[word:wabah|wabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabahuthu|wabahuthu]] || [[word:wabahuju|wabahuju]] || [[word:wabahushu|wabahushu]] || [[word:wabahu|wabahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabahufuth|wabahufuth]] || [[word:wabahufuj|wabahufuj]] || [[word:wabahufush|wabahufush]] || [[word:wabahuf|wabahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wabahethe|wabahethe]] || [[word:wabaheje|wabaheje]] || [[word:wabaheshe|wabaheshe]] || [[word:wabahe|wabahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wabahothoth|wabahothoth]] || [[word:wabahojoj|wabahojoj]] || [[word:wabahoshosh|wabahoshosh]] || [[word:wabah|wabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabahotho|wabahotho]] || [[word:wabahojo|wabahojo]] || [[word:wabahosho|wabahosho]] || [[word:wabaho|wabaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabahofoth|wabahofoth]] || [[word:wabahofoj|wabahofoj]] || [[word:wabahofosh|wabahofosh]] || [[word:wabahof|wabahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wabahĂŠthĂŠ|wabahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wabahĂŠjĂŠ|wabahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wabahĂŠshĂŠ|wabahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wabahĂŠ|wabahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wabahathath|wabahathath]] || [[word:wabahajaj|wabahajaj]] || [[word:wabahashash|wabahashash]] || [[word:wabah|wabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabahatha|wabahatha]] || [[word:wabahaja|wabahaja]] || [[word:wabahasha|wabahasha]] || [[word:wabaha|wabaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabahafath|wabahafath]] || [[word:wabahafaj|wabahafaj]] || [[word:wabahafash|wabahafash]] || [[word:wabahaf|wabahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wabahasha|wabahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowabahasha|gowabahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwabahasha|gokiwabahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wabahnĂŒsha|wabahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowabahnknĂŒsha|gowabahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwabahnĂŒsha|gokiwabahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wabahshĂ«sha|wabahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowabahnkshĂ«sha|gowabahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwabahshĂ«sha|gokiwabahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wabahrosha|wabahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowabahnkrosha|gowabahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwabahrosha|gokiwabahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wabahmusha|wabahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowabahnkmusha|gowabahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwabahmusha|gokiwabahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wabahsherasha|wabahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowabahnksherasha|gowabahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwabahsherasha|gokiwabahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wabahngasha|wabahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowabahnkngasha|gowabahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwabahngasha|gokiwabahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wabahyasha|wabahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowabahnkyasha|gowabahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwabahyasha|gokiwabahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wabahyamasha|wabahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowabahnkyamasha|gowabahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwabahyamasha|gokiwabahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wabahnĂŒshĂ«sha|wabahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowabahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowabahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwabahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwabahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wabahnĂŒrosha|wabahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowabahnknĂŒrosha|gowabahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwabahnĂŒrosha|gokiwabahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wabahnĂŒmusha|wabahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowabahnknĂŒmusha|gowabahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwabahnĂŒmusha|gokiwabahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wabahshĂ«nĂŒsha|wabahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowabahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowabahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwabahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwabahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wabahshĂ«rosha|wabahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowabahnkshĂ«rosha|gowabahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwabahshĂ«rosha|gokiwabahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wabahshĂ«musha|wabahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowabahnkshĂ«musha|gowabahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwabahshĂ«musha|gokiwabahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wabahronĂŒsha|wabahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowabahnkronĂŒsha|gowabahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwabahronĂŒsha|gokiwabahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wabahroshĂ«sha|wabahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowabahnkroshĂ«sha|gowabahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwabahroshĂ«sha|gokiwabahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wabahromusha|wabahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowabahnkromusha|gowabahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwabahromusha|gokiwabahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wabahmunĂŒsha|wabahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowabahnkmunĂŒsha|gowabahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwabahmunĂŒsha|gokiwabahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wabahmushĂ«sha|wabahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowabahnkmushĂ«sha|gowabahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwabahmushĂ«sha|gokiwabahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wabahmurosha|wabahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowabahnkmurosha|gowabahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwabahmurosha|gokiwabahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wabah|wabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠh|wĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howabah|howabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠbĂŠh|howĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowabah|hohowabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠbĂŠh|hohowĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwabah|nĂŒwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŒwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwabah|nĂŒnĂŒwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwabah|nĂŻwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŻwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwabah|nĂŻnĂŻwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠbĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwabah|luwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠbĂŠh|luwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwabah|luluwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠbĂŠh|luluwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwabah|liwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠbĂŠh|liwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwabah|liliwabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠbĂŠh|liliwĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowabah|kowabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠbĂŠh|kowĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowabah|kokowabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠbĂŠh|kokowĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewabah|kewabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠbĂŠh|kewĂŠbĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewabah|kekewabah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠbĂŠh|kekewĂŠbĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
